scores.correctness_notes: The layer YAML structure is correct (override, type, location, services, labels). However, the gold standard requires explaining ALL three protocol type options (loki, opentelemetry/OTLP, syslog with RFC 5424). The agent only discusses loki and explicitly claims it is 'the only supported type' — this is factually wrong. The agent also incorrectly states there is no gRPC option, missing that opentelemetry supports OTLP.
scores.hallucination_notes: Agent claims loki is 'The only supported type' which is false — opentelemetry and syslog are also valid types. Agent adds unverified claims: 'No built-in auth', 'Pebble buffers logs internally and retries on failure', and 'no gRPC/protobuf option'. The LogForwarder/cos-lib section was not asked about and introduces out-of-scope details that may contain inaccuracies.
